---
title: "PyMathon"
description: "Carefully written mathematics: proofs, problem solving, worked examples, and computational exploration where it adds insight."
author: "Ashish K. Srivastava"
comments: false
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.home-hero-copy}
::: {.home-eyebrow}
PYMATHON · MATHEMATICAL NOTES BY ASHISH K. SRIVASTAVA
:::

# Ideas first. Proofs made clear.

PyMathon develops mathematical ideas from their first definitions to complete
arguments, worked examples, and deeper connections.

[Read the latest articles](#articles){.home-primary-link}
:::

::: {.home-math-panel aria-label="A selection of mathematical ideas explored on PyMathon"}
::: {.home-math-line}
$$
|A+A|\geq 2|A|-1
$$
:::

::: {.home-math-line}
$$
\int_a^b f(x)\,dx
=
\frac12\int_a^b\!\left[f(x)+f(a+b-x)\right]dx
$$
:::

::: {.home-math-caption}
Structure · symmetry · proof
:::
:::
:::

::: {.home-principles}
::: {.home-principle}
### Begin with meaning

Definitions and notation are introduced before they are used.
:::

::: {.home-principle}
### Show the argument

Important claims are explained through complete, readable reasoning.
:::

::: {.home-principle}
### Explore further

Computation is used only when it reveals a pattern, checks a result, or improves
visual understanding.
:::
:::

## Articles {#articles}
